title: Chicken Italian Skillet
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Italian-inspired chicken skillet recipe, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, 3-4 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned and cooked through, 5-6 minutes.
Stir in the chicken broth, salt, pepper, and basil.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until the liquid has reduced slightly, 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the parmesan cheese until melted.
Serve hot, garnished with additional basil if desired.
